chapter_mapping: 第七大章 = 高考能力专题 = G-01..G-12

G-SYS-01.evidence: 12/12 nodes now require prediction before revealing the canvas, readout, formula, explanation, boundary, transfer, and replay path.

G-SYS-02.evidence: 12/12 nodes expose a static reduced-motion completion path and pass 390x844 overflow/runtime checks; initial motion is paused or starts stopped.

G-01.evidence: Non-origin I-U line reports slope 0.45 by delta-y/delta-x while y/x is demonstrably different and limited to origin-proportional lines.

G-02.evidence: The outlier action stays disabled until repeat evidence exists; the original six records remain visible after the five-point fit is selected.

G-03.evidence: Instrument, range/multiplier, and zero correction are independent; meter ranges and nonlinear ohmmeter scale/multipliers are separately modeled.

G-04.evidence: Every displayed row error is recomputed from the corrected reading, and credibility is bound to task tolerance rather than a universal 2 percent verdict.

G-05.evidence: Inner/outer topology, RA/RV loading, divider/limiter network, meter ranges, rheostat power, readings, and safety use one circuit solver.

G-06.evidence: The page is explicitly the inner-track top; contact force is inward and nonnegative, with detachment shown when the required force is negative.

G-07.evidence: The acceleration-to-uniform boundary preserves both velocity and position, with the next step continuing from the same state.

G-08.evidence: At half post-collision energy, the drawn compression ratio is sqrt(1/2); momentum and spring-energy stages use distinct, defined accounts.

G-09.evidence: One SI position drives flux, flux rate, emf, current, force, and power; abs(dPhi/dt)=abs(emf) and force opposes actual motion.

G-10.evidence: Only exact opposing force balance is labeled theoretical straight-through; any experimental bandwidth requires a separate resolution model.

G-11.evidence: Ground-frame no-drag drop uses constant release horizontal speed and hides the irrelevant control; braking is labeled a level-road limiting model.

G-12.evidence: Orbit height uniquely derives radius, circular speed, and period from Earth gravity; the independent speed and irrelevant ratio controls are disabled/hidden.
